data: Under Secretary of Defense for Research and Engineering
Under Secretary of Defense for Research and Engineering, DoD - Department of Defense -- DAEO Agency
This fund sold is assets and distributed all proceeds to shareholders in 2024.  This asset is therefore no longer held.

This is a service provided through the company Radical.  My income from Intro.co is separate from my equity interest in Radical.  I did not receive equity for coaching.  The equity interest granted for separate advisory services for Radical is separately reported as Radical.
D-Wave Quantum, 75,675 vested restricted stock units
Dental Insurance Refund Due to Overpayment (M8 Enterprises LLC)
Rent the Runway, 2,184 vested restricted stock units, partially expired upon resignation
Oyo Hotels US (hotel chain) (client of M8 Enterprises), vested stock options

Board Member of hotel chain (recently bought Motel 6) that also provides management services and standardization for independent motel operators.  As a member of Oyo's US subsidiary, I received a contractual option to buy the parent company stock at a fixed price. These options have vested, but I have received no documentation as to how to exercise the options in the future.
Advisor to cryptocurrency exchange like Coinbase.
BinanceUS (cryptocurrency exchange) (client of M8 Enterprises) vested stock options
BinanceUS (cryptocurrency exchange) (client of M8 Enterprises) unvested stock options
Dray Holdings (software) (client of M8 Enterprises) vested stock options.  Company in receivership
Advisor to a freight forwarding software company focused on drayage.  I received stock options in this company which was recently moved into receivership and the options are worthless.

Advisor to company that provides software to help Registered Investment Advisors have better access to products for their clients.  I received 16,085 stock options with a strike price of $0.54 per option for being an advisor. Vesting began in September 2022 and end in September 2025. These options expire unless exercised 3 months from the termination of the advisory relationship for any reason. As a private company, these instruments have multiple contingencies and are difficult to ascertain value.
Vise (software) (client of M8 Enterprises) vested stock options
Vise (software) (client of M8 Enterprises) unvested stock options
Tools for Humanity (cryptocurrency and identity management) (client of M8 Enterprises)

Advisor to company that provides a crypto currency and true identity management system.  I receive crypto tokens for being an advisor. These crypto tokens are called WorldCoin currently valued at $1.21 per token. I am vesting 1 million tokens beginning on May 2024 through November 2025. These tokens further have a lock-up that further delays vesting by delivering the tokens in a formula beginning after the end of the vesting period subject to unilateral change by the company.  The tokens are not freely tradeable and have a long-term lockup period that ladders over many years and thus can only be valued after the lock-up period which is also changeable by management.  The tokens are not considered ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‹Å“vestedÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â€žÂ¢ until the lock-up expires.
Tools for Humanity (cryptocurrency management) (client of M8 Enterprises), vested WorldCoin cryptocurrency tokens
Tools for Humanity (cryptocurrency management) (client of M8 Enterprises), unvested WorldCoin cryptocurrency tokens
Telly (television products) (client of M8 Enterprises), vested stock options

Advisor to a company that provides a new TV with 2 screens that allows for multi-program watching and new advertising products.  I received 43,256 stock options at a strike price of $1.76 per option for being an advisor. I have vested these stock options as of 2024 and they expire unless exercised approximately in 2034. As a private company, these instruments have multiple contingencies and are difficult to ascertain value.
Pronto (software) (client of M8 Enterprises) vested common stock

Advisor to a company that is building software for autonomous mining vehicles.  I exercised 65,000 stock options at a strike price of $1.63 and received restricted stock which vested from January 2023 through July 2024. I took out a loan from the company for the exercise amount and therefore the stock is collateral. These options are currently valued by the company at $1.08 per share and therefore underwater.
Dr. B (telemedicine) (client of M8 Enterprises), vested common stock

Advisor to company that provides a telemedicine app for quick diagnosis and treatment.  I receive 24,000 stock options at $.01 which I exercised. The vesting period was May 2021 through May 2024. As a private company, these instruments have multiple contingencies and are difficult to ascertain value.
Omio (travel app) (client of M8 Enterprises) vested stock options
Advisor to a company that provides a phone-based app that allows for train booking in Europe without visiting a ticket office.
Pearpop (software) (client of M8 Enterprises), vested restricted stock units

Advisor to company that provides software that helps 'creators' make and distribute their content.  I receive 100,000 RSUs for being an advisor from February 2021 through February 2023. These RSUs were valued at $4.10 at the time of grant. As a private company, these instruments have multiple contingencies and are difficult to value.
Thrive Global (wellness app and website) (client of M8 Enterprises), vested stock options

Advisor to online wellness app and site that encourages people to take micro-steps.  I received 420,000 stock options with a strike price of $0.36 per option. I began vesting in November 2019 and completed vesting in October 2023. The options expire in 2029.
Brex (software) (client of M8 Enterprises) vested stock options

Advisor to a company that provides an online banking and expense management software.  I received 639,345 stock options for being an advisor at a strike price of $4.07 per option. I began vesting these options in June 2019 and completed in June 2023. These options expire in June 2027 if not exercised. As a private company, these instruments have multiple contingencies and are difficult to value but the most recent 409a value was $2.46 making the options heavily underwater
Crossroads AI (software) (client of M8 Enterprises), vested incentive units

Advisor to company advertising and marketing cloud-based software.  I received 200,000 Incentive Units which have been fully vested as the company restructured from a previous company. I filed an 83b valuation with the IRS in 2024 with a value from the company of $.01. This company due to a split, recapitalization and re-naming has a capital structure that makes it difficult to ascertain value.

Advisor to blockchain company that also provides stablecoins that pay interest to consumers.   I exercised 64,787 stock options at $.02 per option. The options began vesting June 2024 and will complete vesting in June 2028. If I stop providing consulting services, the company has the right to repurchase the stock at cost. As a small private company, this restricted stock have value that is difficult to ascertain.
1Money (blockchain) (client of M8 Enterprises), vested common stock
1Money (blockchain) (client of M8 Enterprises), unvested common stock
Pamoja Ventures (venture capital) (client of M8 Enterprise), vested anticipated profit interests (underlying assets disclosed in endnote)

Pamoja Ventures GP, Ltd.  Advisor to venture capital fund focused on African and Middle East start-ups. I receive a 1% profit share for being an advisor.  Fund strategy:  focuses on start-ups in Africa and Middle East building products for payments/wealth, e- commerce/marketplaces, insurance and health, and infrastructure/SAAS  Underlying investments: Nuitee--unified API and software provider focused on hospitality vertical Juicyway--financial tech company for foreign exchange transactions in Nigeria Raenest--Nigerian tech company that offers multi currency bank accounts Gameball--Egypt-based customer retention and loyalty software Salus---software for simplifying and abstracting complexities of software deployment MNXL--secured loans to the underbanked in Egypt Copper---Nigerian company providing tailored solutions for small and midsize businesses needing banking services Lengo---software for data visualization for retail businesses Stakpak---software to support software developers and make it easier to work with infrastructure
Ankorstore (wholesale online retailer) (client of M8 Enterprises)

Advisor to a company that is a wholesaler of 'gift store' items to gift stores that provides economies of scale and better selection.  I purchased 270 stock options which permit be to buy future stock at an exercise price per share of approximately $900 Euro per share. I vest these stock options from February 2023 through February 2026. As a private French company with a unique capital structure, it is difficult to ascertain to the value of these options.
Ankorstore (wholesale online retailer) (client of M8 Enterprises) vested stock options
Ankorstore (wholesale online retailer) (client of M8 Enterprises) unvested stock options

Advisor to company that software that enables the delivery of prescriptions from independent pharmacies.  I received 192,620 RSUs that vest from February 2023 through February 2026. There is a second vesting condition that requires the company to go public or be acquired for me to gain ownership. As a private company with both a time and liquidity-based vesting condition, the value of these RSUs is not readily ascertainable.
NimbleRx (pharmacy delivery) (client of M8 Enterprises), vested RSUs
NimbleRx (pharmacy delivery) (client of M8 Enterprises), unvested RSUs
Greenlite (software) (client of M8 Enterprises), vested common stock

Advisor to company that provides software for builders and local permitting entities to streamline the receipt of permits necessary.  I exercised 50,000 stock options at $.05 per option that I received for as compensation for consulting services. Vesting was completed in July 2024. As a small private company, the value is not readily ascertainable.

Advisor to a company that allows companies to design and manufacture consumer products in a one- stopshop.  I received 147,653 stock options with a strike price of $.53 per share. These options began vesting on March 2023 and complete vesting on March 2027. Upon termination of the advisory relationship for any reason, the options if unexercised expire within 3 years. I believe the options to be underwater.
Pietra (consumer product design platform), vested stock options
Pietra (consumer product design platform), unvested stock options
Design Commerce Technologies - Dubfrequency (online commerce - goods and furniture) vested common stock

Board Member to an online commerce company that sells high end goods and furniture.  I received 106,321 stock options which I exercised at $.01 per share. They vested through April 2024. This company was later acquired. The current 409a value is estimated to be $3.87 per share.
Bond Capital (advisory to management company of investment firm) anticipated profit interests (held in Family Trust #3)

Advisor to an investment firm.  I received profit shares in this firm that vested beginning in April 2019 and complete vesting in November 2026. This profit share is contingent on the firm making profits on its investments which are typically 7 to 15 years from the investment point.
Bond Capital Management, vested anticipated profit interests

Bond Capital Associates, LLC (profit share is for a subset of portfolio)  Bond II Associates, LLC (profit share is for a subset of portfolio)  Bond III Associates, LLC (profit share is for a subset of (portfolio)
Bond Capital Management, unvested anticipated profit interests
Bond III Associates, LLC (profit share is for a subset of portfolio)

Board Member for a company that provides HR, scheduling, and payment software for oil rig workers and the companies with which they contract.  I received 22,000 RSUs that vested beginning May 2022 and complete vesting on November 2026. Additionally, these RSUs do not fully vest until their is a liquidity event. The most recent 409a valuation was $190 per vested RSU.

Board Member for a company that provides software for consumers to choose options for building a home and software for builders to streamline their construction project.  I received 1 million stock options at a strike price of $.06 per share beginning vesting in March 2020 and completing in March 2025. These options, I believe, expire unless exercised in 2030. The most recent valuation was $.28 per option.

Board Member for a company that provides a phone app that provides search capabilities that compete with existing search and answer engines.  I received 30,000 stock options which I exercised partially for cash and partially via a loan from the company. The stock vests from March 2024 through August 2026. If I do not provide consulting services, the company may repurchase the stock at cost for the unvested portion. The most recent 409a valuation was $21 per share

Board Member for a company that provides quick delivery of convenience store items like chips and sodas.  I received 20,000 RSUs that began vesting in June 2023 and complete vesting in June 2027. There is a second vesting condition which is contingent on the company going public or being acquired. The most recent 409a price per share was $64 per RSU.

Board Member to company that provides a software platform for consumers to find homes to buy and to apply for financing.  I received 157,649 options which complete vesting in April 2025 at a strike price of approximately $3 per share. The options expire between 2029 and 2033. The most recent 409a price was $2.94 per share.

Advisor to a company that builds warehouse machines to reduce human strain.  I received 37,500 stock options that I exercised at $.06 per share. These shares began vesting in December 2022 and complete vesting in December 2026. The company may repurchase unvested stock at cost upon termination of the advisory relationship. The most recent 409a valuation was $5.58 per share.
Collaborative Robotics (warehouse robotics) vested common stock
Collaborative Robotics (warehouse robotics) unvested common stock
Motive (fleet management services), vested common stock

Advisor to company that provides fleet management services for commercial trucking entities.  I received 50,000 options at a strike price of $.83 per option which I exercised. The vesting period was February 2020 through February 2024. The most recent 409a valuation was $3.89 per share.

Advisor to company that provides software for company legal departments and law firms to more quickly create and edit documents.  I received 108,760 stock options for being an advisor at a strike price of $10.56 per share. These shares began vesting July 2024 and complete vesting July 2027. These options expire if unexercised in 2034. The most recent 409a valuation was $21.45.
Radical Company (social app), vested stock options

Advisor to company that provides a phone app that connects 'mentors' with those trying to learn business skills and charges a fee.  I received 20,080 stock options at a strike price of $.48 per share for being an advisor. These options vested from April 2021 through April 2023. These options expire 3 months from the termination of the advisory arrangement. I have no information on the financials of this company therefore making it difficult to ascertain value.
Thursday Ventures (gene therapy and devices) (value not readily ascertainable), anticipated profit share (~30-40% of Science Corporation, in which Thursday Ventures holds shares)

Advisor to investment firm specifically for a company using gene therapy and devices to cure blindness.  I receive a profit share of an investment Thursday Ventures made in a company called Science that is trying to cure blindness with gene therapy and implants. It is difficult to ascertain value for this small and highly risky company.

Advisor to company that provides dental software for dentist offices to offset capital cost for scanners.  I was granted 72,474 options at a strike price of $4.10 per share. These shares vest from September 2021 through September 2025. If the advisory relationship is terminated, the company may repurchase the shares at cost. My understanding is that the company currently values the shares at approximately $37 per share.
Kalshi (event contract marketplace) vested common stock

Advisor to company that is a CFTC regulated marketplace for event contracts.  I receive 61,482 stock options at a strike price of $1.77 per share which I exercised. I began vesting those shares in July 2021 and completed in July 2024.

Advisor to a company that provides an online accredited community college that increases success rates via higher quality professors and new technologies.  I received 199,180 stock options with a strike price of $.66 per share which I exercised. These shares vested beginning October 2023 and complete vesting October 2027. Based on the recent nature of my involvement, I do not believe the valuation has changed.
Campus Group (online community college) vested common stock
Campus Group (online community college) unvested common stock
Kyte (car rental app), vested stock options

Advisor to a company that provides a phone-based app that allows consumers to rent cars that are delivered to you.  I received 182,090 stock options at a strike price of $.76 per share for being an advisor. These options began vesting April 2022	and finished vesting April 2024. These options expire 3 months after termination of the agreement if not exercised. Based on a recent recapitalization, I believe these options to be materially underwater.

Advisor to a company that provides software to reduce the need for title insurance.  I received liquid RSUs for being an advisor. This company was sold in 2024, and I no longer have any interests in the company.
Ordinary income and capital gains during reporting period
Evenflow (client of M8 Enterprises) vested phantom stock, foreign

M8 Enterprises LLC will stop providing advisory services upon confirmation. I will continue to manage the assets this company holds, which will likely require expenses but will not generate profit besides below-cost ticket sales revenue, if I am confirmed. These assets will be passively managed. I have season tickets for the Miami Heat, and I sell them when I cannot attend. I take an annual loss on this, but recover some of the outlay by these sales. (2018-01-01)
Passive LLC that will stay open as it only holds a loan from JP Morgan against liquid passively-owned assets through the end of the loan in 2026 at which point, I plan to shut it down. (2020-10-01)

Passive LLC that held an interest in a SPAC that has recently liquidated and will be shut down after the end of the grantor retained annuity trust period in late 2025. Annuity received in August 2024 of $14,708. (2020-08-01)
D-Wave Quantum (client of M8 Enterprises LLC)
No ongoing relationship or holdings or economics as of the date of filing. (2022-08-01)
Crossroads (DG Onpoint) (client of M8 Enterprises LLC)
Profit units already vested will be retained.  No unvested profit units (2024-03-01)

I will retain my vested stock options through their expiration date or exercise them and retain them as common stock. If Homebound accelerates any unvested stock options, they must accelerate them before I assume the duties of the position of Under Secretary or I will forfeit them. (2020-02-01)

I hold vested and unvested stock.  I do not hold any other equity interest in these entities. The entities have a contractual right to repurchase my unvested stock within a designated timeframe following my resignation at the price I paid or less. Should the entities elect not to repurchase my unvested stock within the specified timeframe, I am contractually permitted to retain any unvested stock. If any of the entities elect to repurchase my unvested stock, I will accept no more than the price I paid when purchasing. I will not participate personally and substantially in any particular matter that to my knowledge has a direct and predictable effect on my financial interests in any of these entities, unless I first obtain a written waiver, pursuant to 18 U.S.C. § 208(b)(1). (2024-03-01)
I will retain my vested RSUs. If Workrise accelerates any unvested RSUs, they must accelerate them before I assume the duties of the position of Under Secretary or I will forfeit them. (2022-05-01)
I will retain my vested RSUs.  If GoBrands accelerates any unvested RSUs, they must accelerate them before I assume the duties of the position of Under Secretary or I will forfeit them. (2023-06-01)

I will retain vested options until they are exercised and become common stock or until they expire.  If Loft accelerates any unvested stock options, they must accelerate them before I assume the duties of the position of Under Secretary or I will forfeit them. (2019-05-01)
I will retain vested common stock. (2022-07-01)
I will retain my vested RSUs.  If NimbleRX accelerates any unvested RSUs, they must accelerate them before I assume the duties of the position of Under Secretary or I will forfeit them. (2023-02-01)

I hold vested and unvested stock.  I do not hold any other equity interest in these entities. The entities have a contractual right to repurchase my unvested stock within a designated timeframe following my resignation at the price I paid or less. Should the entities elect not to repurchase my unvested stock within the specified timeframe, I am contractually permitted to retain any unvested stock. If any of the entities elect to repurchase my unvested stock, I will accept no more than the price I paid when purchasing. I will not participate personally and substantially in any particular matter that to my knowledge has a direct and predictable effect on my financial interests in any of these entities, unless I first obtain a written waiver, pursuant to 18 U.S.C. § 208(b)(1). (2022-12-01)

I will retain my vested stock options.  If Ankorstore accelerates any unvested stock options, they must accelerate them before I assume the duties of the position of Under Secretary or I will forfeit them (2023-02-01)
I will retain vested common stock. (2022-02-01)

I will retain my vested stock options. If CounselAI accelerates any unvested stock options, they must accelerate them before I assume the duties of the position of Under Secretary or I will forfeit them. (2024-07-01)

I will retain my vested stock options. The vested stock options expire 3 months after the termination of my services. If Radical determines to extends the expiration, they must do so before I assume the duties of the position of Under Secretary or they will expire under the terms of the agreement. (2021-04-01)
Pamoja Ventures (client of M8 Enterprises LLC)
Vested anticipated profit share will be retained. (2022-09-01)
I will retain my vested profits interest. Bond Capital will vest the unvested profit interest before I assumes the duties of the position of Undersecretary or I will forfeit it. (2019-04-01)
Vested anticipated profit share will be retained (2024-02-01)

I hold vested and unvested stock.  I do not hold any other equity interest in these entities. The entities have a contractual right to repurchase my unvested stock within a designated timeframe following my resignation at the price I paid or less. Should the entities elect not to repurchase my unvested stock within the specified timeframe, I am contractually permitted to retain any unvested stock. If any of the entities elect to repurchase my unvested stock, I will accept no more than the price I paid when purchasing. I will not participate personally and substantially in any particular matter that to my knowledge has a direct and predictable effect on my financial interests in any of these entities, unless I first obtain a written waiver, pursuant to 18 U.S.C. § 208(b)(1). (2024-06-01)
Oyo Hotels US (client of M8 Enterprises LLC)

Options expire in March 2025 as informally communicated. If Oyo determines to extends the expiration, they must do so before I assume the duties of the position of Under Secretary or they will expire under the terms of the agreement or I will forfeit them (2021-02-01)
Binance US (client of M8 Enterprises LLC)

I will retain my vested stock option. The vested stock options expire 3 months after the termination of my services.  If Binance determines to extends the expiration, they must do so before I assume the duties of the position of Under Secretary or they will expire under the terms of the agreement. Additionally, if Binance accelerates any unvested stock options, they must accelerate them before I assume the duties of the position of Under Secretary or I will forfeit them.  Vested options that are not exercised are subject to forfeiture along with unvested options. (2022-04-01)
Dray Holdings (client of M8 Enterprises LLC)
Will retain vested and unvested options until I exercise them or they expire (2022-09-01)
Tools for Humanity (client of M8 Enterprises LLC)

I will retain my tokens that have been vested, but they are not able to be released to me or sold during a company defined lock up period.  If Tools for Humanity accelerates any unvested tokens, they must accelerate them before I assume the duties of the position of Under Secretary or I will forfeit them. (2024-05-01)

I hold vested and unvested stock.  I do not hold any other equity interest in these entities. The entities have a contractual right to repurchase my unvested stock within a designated timeframe following my resignation at the price I paid or less. Should the entities elect not to repurchase my unvested stock within the specified timeframe, I am contractually permitted to retain any unvested stock. If any of the entities elect to repurchase my unvested stock, I will accept no more than the price I paid when purchasing. I will not participate personally and substantially in any particular matter that to my knowledge has a direct and predictable effect on my financial interests in any of these entities, unless I first obtain a written waiver, pursuant to 18 U.S.C. § 208(b)(1). (2021-09-01)
Retain vested stock options until exercised or expiration (2024-01-01)

I hold vested and unvested stock.  I do not hold any other equity interest in these entities. The entities have a contractual right to repurchase my unvested stock within a designated timeframe following my resignation at the price I paid or less. Should the entities elect not to repurchase my unvested stock within the specified timeframe, I am contractually permitted to retain any unvested stock. If any of the entities elect to repurchase my unvested stock, I will accept no more than the price I paid when purchasing. I will not participate personally and substantially in any particular matter that to my knowledge has a direct and predictable effect on my financial interests in any of these entities, unless I first obtain a written waiver, pursuant to 18 U.S.C. § 208(b)(1). (2023-10-01)
Company has repurchased the vested stock for an amount so as to retire the loan against the shares.  I own no securities as of March 11, 2025 (2023-01-01)

I will retain my vested stock option. They expires 3 months after the termination of my services.  If Kyte determines to extends the expiration, they must do so before I assume the duties of the position of Under Secretary or they will expire under the terms of the agreement. (2022-04-01)
Dr. B (client of M8 Enterprises LLC)
I will retain my vested common stock. (2021-05-01)
Retain vested stock options through exercise or expiration. (2022-02-01)
I will retain vested common stock. (2021-11-01)
I will retain vested restricted stock units (2021-02-01)

I will retain my vested stock options until I exercise them or they expire in 3/2033. If Pietra accelerates any unvested stock options, they must accelerate them before I assume the duties of the position of Under Secretary or I will forfeit them. (2023-03-01)
Vested stock options retained until the earlier of exercise or expiration. (2019-11-01)
Rent The Runway (client of M8 Enterprises LLC)
I will retain vested stock options through exercise or expiration in June 2029. (2019-06-01)
I will retain my vested phantom stock (2021-09-01)
